vision: To shape sustainable and inclusive urban environments in Bhutan that honor cultural heritage, uphold environmental values, and enhance community well-being
project: At Consult2T, we proactively shape sustainable and inclusive urban environments throughout Bhutan, with an unwavering commitment to respecting cultural heritage, upholding vital environmental values, and enhancing the collective well-being of its people.
our_team: Our Collective Expertise, Driven by Passion and a Commitment to Excellence
affiliation: Strategic partnerships broaden our capabilities, fostering impact through vital collaboration.

history.quote: Our journey reflects a rich history of continuous growth and adaptation, demonstrating an unwavering commitment to excellence and innovation, shaping landscapes and communities across Bhutan over the years.
history.paragraph_one: Consult2T was founded with a clear vision: to bridge the gap between policy and de- sign by leveraging extensive government-sector experience in urban planning and architecture. After serving 15 years in the Bhutan Civil Service, the founder, an accom- plished urban planner and architect, sought to create a platform where this expertise could directly contribute to national development.
history.paragraph_two: On March 27, 2023, Consult2T was officially registered with the Construction Develop- ment Board (CDB) of Bhutan. What began as a two-person operation has since grown into a dynamic team of 11 professionals. The firm has quickly established itself as a trust- ed player in the field, delivering a growing portfolio of architectural projects across the country. Notably, Consult2T is currently leading three Local Area Plans—govern- ment-backed initiatives aimed at structured urban development. As the company continues to expand, its mission remains rooted in delivering impact- ful, context-sensitive design solutions that align with Bhutan’s development goals and value

footer.craft_spaces: Crafting spaces that resonate with innovation, and mindfulness
